title: Collect JSON Objects into Array
cap_description: Collect individual JSON objects into a single JSON array
documentation:
## Purpose

Gathers a sequence of individual JSON objects (one per pipeline item) into a single JSON array. Use this to fan-in results from parallel processing where each parallel branch produces one JSON object.

## Inputs

A sequence of JSON record objects.

## Outputs

A JSON array containing all input objects in order.

## Notes

- The objects do not need to have the same keys; heterogeneous objects are permitted.
- For CSV output, use [Collect JSON Objects into CSV](https://capdag.com/browse/cap:in="media:json;record;textable";op=collect_json_objects;out="media:csv;list;record;textable").
- For YAML output, use [Collect JSON Objects into YAML List](https://capdag.com/browse/cap:in="media:json;record;textable";op=collect_json_objects;out="media:list;record;textable;yaml").

args.arg_description: JSON objects to collect into an array

output.output_description: JSON array containing all input objects
